=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|width=75
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Corviknight
|stage2=Corvisquire
|type1=Flying
|type2=Steel
|img=Hop Corvisquire Adventures.png
|img2=Hop Corviknight Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS06
|epname=Watch Out!! Strong Rivals
|desc={{p|Corviknight}} is Hop's first known Pokémon. As a {{p|Corvisquire}}, it was first used to help move a boulder blocking the way to [[Turffield]]. It later evolved into Corviknight after Hop trained on the [[Isle of Armor]].

Corviknight's only known move is {{m|Pluck}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|width=75
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Pincurchin
|dyna=yes
|type1=Electric
|img=Hop Pincurchin Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS11
|epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon
|desc={{p|Pincurchin}} is Hop's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle a wild {{p|Cramorant}}.

Pincurchin's known moves are {{m|Zing Zap}} and {{m|Spark}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Snorlax
|type1=Normal
|img=Hop Snorlax Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS11
|epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon
|desc={{p|Snorlax}} is Hop's third known Pokémon. It was first used to help battle a wild {{p|Cramorant}}. It used its bulky body to catch Pokémon fired from Cramorant's {{a|Gulp Missile}}.

None of Snorlax's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Dubwool 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Dubwool
|stage1=Wooloo
|type1=Normal
|img=Hop Wooloo Adventures.png
|img2=Hop Dubwool Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS11
|epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon
|desc={{p|Dubwool}} is Hop's fourth known Pokémon. It was first seen as a {{p|Wooloo}} as part of Hop's [[party]]. It was later revealed to have evolved into a Dubwool.

None of Dubwool's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Cramorant 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Cramorant
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Hop Cramorant Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS10
|epname=Blazing!! Bede's Feelings
|desc={{p|Cramorant}} is Hop's fifth known Pokémon. Hop first encountered it at a swamp, where it attempted to eat [[Casey Shield|Casey]]'s {{p|Arrokuda}}, Kilo. With Casey's guidance, Hop freed Kilo, allowing him to catch Cramorant afterward.

None of Cramorant's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Gulp Missile}}.}}
